authority_state.delta: Current truth adds Track 01 bounded comparative proof closure and a clean Track 02 authority-partitioned audit footing.
authority_state.what_improved: Track 01 is closed and Track 02 is now executing from a tracked clean harvest path.
authority_state.what_stayed_weak: H1, externality ceiling, platform enforcement, canonical merge, and commercial proof all remain open.

benchmark_readiness.delta: Track 01 closes the first bounded benchmark lane.
benchmark_readiness.what_is_newly_benchmark_ready: Internal bounded governed-execution comparison on the local_verifier_mode wedge.
benchmark_readiness.what_is_still_not_benchmark_ready: Public leaderboards, enterprise bakeoffs, cross-host capability comparisons, Kaggle or math tracks.

claim_safety.delta: Track 01 and Track 02 both preserved forbidden-interpretation discipline.
claim_safety.what_improved: Evidence separation is now even tighter.
claim_safety.what_stayed_weak: No weakness on this axis beyond human retelling risk.

commercial_product_truth.what_stayed_weak: Zero customers, zero revenue, single-tenant only.

control_plane_truth.delta: No sovereign gate changed; only the post-F track layer advanced.

full_system_execution_readiness.what_stayed_weak: No civilization-grade ratification, no H1, no E2+.

governed_system.at_current_truth: Same plus Track 01 bounded proof frozen and Track 02 dual audit running
governed_system.at_frozen_baseline: Gate D cleared, Gate E open, Gate F narrow wedge confirmed, re-audit passed
governed_system.delta: Track 01 adds a real bounded proof layer; Track 02 adds an adversarial audit lane.
governed_system.what_improved: Governed proof and review surfaces expanded without widening product truth.

historical_bounded_proof.delta: The largest substantive improvement is the addition of a repeated bounded comparative proof packet.
historical_bounded_proof.what_improved: Track 01 is now real and frozen.
historical_bounded_proof.what_stayed_weak: Comparator set remains tiny and category-bounded.

at_current_truth: The same five blocker families remain open
open_blockers.delta: No structural blocker was cleared by Track 01 or Track 02 execution.
open_blockers.what_stayed_weak: All five blocker families remain active.

repo_architecture.at_current_truth: Same spine plus Track 01 execution artifacts and Track 02 tracked courts
repo_architecture.at_frozen_baseline: Clean canonical spine through Gate F with quarantine law and protected merge discipline
repo_architecture.delta: Post-F expansion logic is now executing through bounded comparative and audit courts.
repo_architecture.what_improved: Comparative proof and dual-audit machinery are now both present.
repo_architecture.what_stayed_weak: No external code audit and repo-root import fragility remain.

runtime_capability_truth.delta: No runtime promotion occurred between baseline and current truth.
runtime_capability_truth.what_stayed_weak: E1 ceiling, no H1, no E2+.

required_questions.what_improved_because_system_improved: Track 01 closed as a repeated bounded comparative proof, and Track 02 now has a clean shared-harvest audit footing.
required_questions.what_is_newly_benchmark_ready: The internal bounded comparator lane for the confirmed local_verifier_mode wedge.
required_questions.what_is_still_not_lawfully_claimable: Best-AI, broad reasoning superiority, full-system superiority, enterprise readiness, cross-host capability, Kaggle carryover, and multi-tenant claims.
required_questions.what_remains_civilization_ratification_l: Anything beyond E1 and beyond bounded verifier-mode proof remains blocked.
required_questions.what_remains_doctrine_or_lab_only: Broader lobe, router, Kaggle, H1, and civilization-scale claims.
required_questions.what_remains_product_limited: Gate F remains one narrow local_verifier_mode wedge only.
required_questions.what_stayed_weak: Runtime breadth, H1, E2+, platform enforcement, and commercial validation all stayed weak.
